tool_input.command:
cd /Users/shakes/DevProjects/htmlgraph && uv run python -c "
from htmlgraph import SDK
sdk = SDK(agent='sonnet-coder')
with sdk.bugs.edit('bug-9cc49622') as b:
    b.add_note('sonnet-coder: Fixed get_work_item handler to use SQLite + HTML fallback instead of sdk.features.get(). The old code only found features, not spikes (spk-*) or bugs (bug-*). Files changed: packages/phoenix-dashboard/lib/htmlgraph_dashboard/python_sdk.ex. Approach: replaced Python code in handle_call({:get_work_item}) to query features SQLite table first, then fall back to reading HTML from .htmlgraph/{features,bugs,spikes}/ — same pattern already used by get_work_item_titles. Also passes db_path and graph_dir as globals (previously only graph_dir was passed).')
print('Note added')
" 2>/dev/null
tool_input.description: Record fix note on the bug work item
